pattern: (-1) * (((act - ts_delay(act, 12)) - (che - ts_delay(che, 12)) - ((lct - ts_delay(lct, 12)) - (dlc - ts_delay(dlc, 12)) - (fnd6_txp - ts_delay(fnd6_txp, 12))) - dp) / ((at + ts_delay(at, 12)) / 2))
description: Annual change approximated via ts_delay(...,12) on monthly Compustat fields; txp is fillna(0)-treated in source, omitted here; negate to match Sign=-1; abs(prc)>5 filter not applied.

paper_citation: Sloan, R.G. (1996). Do Stock Prices Fully Reflect Information in Accruals and Cash Flows about Future Earnings? The Accounting Review, 71(3), 289-315.

pattern: if_else(fnd6_ceq < 0, nan, rank(log(fnd6_ceq / cap)) - rank(((ts_delta(fnd6_act, 252) - ts_delta(fnd6_che, 252)) - (ts_delta(fnd6_lct, 252) - ts_delta(fnd6_dlc, 252) - ts_delta(fnd6_txp, 252))) / ((fnd6_at + ts_delay(fnd6_at, 252)) / 2)))

paper_citation: Bartov, E. and Kim, M. (2004). Risk, Mispricing, and Value Investing. Review of Quantitative Finance and Accounting.

description: Advertising expense (xad) scaled by market cap; filtered to positive xad only.

pattern: Signal requires IPO date and hand-collected founding year from Ritter's dataset, plus a 3-36 month post-IPO event filter and minimum monthly IPO count threshold.

description: Maps Compustat 'at' to fnd6_assets and market value of equity to cap; signal sign positive.
